title: Get Certified by Meta for FREE!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Thinking about an expensive coding bootcamp? Meta is now offering FREE professional certificate courses on Coursera for high-demand skills like Python, Full-Stack, iOS, and Front-End Development. This is your chance to get a job-ready certification directly from a tech giant and supercharge your resume.
